Related Entities

  • hospital UT HEALTH EAST TEXAS JACKSONVILLE HOSPITAL
  • hospital CHRISTUS MOTHER FRANCES HOSPITAL- JACKSONVILLE
  • hospital RUSK STATE HOSP
  • snf THE ARBORS HEALTHCARE AND REHABILITATION CENTER 4-star, 110 beds
  • snf AVIR AT JACKSONVILLE 5-star, 53 beds
  • snf TWIN OAKS HEALTH AND REHABILITATION CENTER 3-star, 116 beds
  • snf CHEROKEE TRAILS NURSING HOME 2-star, 140 beds
  • snf LEGACY AT JACKSONVILLE 4-star, 101 beds
  • snf Wells LTC Nursing & Rehabilitation 1-star, 90 beds
Methodology

Data source: Medicare Geographic Variation by County (dataset ID: geo-var-county). Vintage: 2023. Downloaded: 2026-04-12. Rows in source: 33,639.

Additional data sources: CDC PLACES County-Level Data (2026)

Medicare Geographic Variation shows standardized per capita spending, utilization, and demographic characteristics for Medicare fee-for-service beneficiaries at the county level. Standardized payments remove geographic payment adjustments to enable fair comparison across regions.

Full methodology →
